prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Fukui reactivity indices (f+, f–, f0) and dual descriptor; most electrophilic (f+) and most nucleophilic (f–) atomic sites for benzaldehyde (gas phase).
Level of theory: Density-functional theory, tier `standard` = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting (PySCF backend).
Geometry provenance: fixed geometry read from user-supplied file “/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz”; no re-optimization (single-point charges for neutral, N+1 cation, and N–1 anion).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (neutral singlet). Cation and anion states: +1/2 and –1/2 doublets, respectively, as required for condensed Fukui functions.
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (PySCF 2.x engine under the hood; Mulliken charge partitioning).
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles for neutral, cation, and anion all converged. No `warnings` array returned by the engine. Integrity checks report status "ok" (trustworthy: true) with three informational items concerning charge conservation (all OK) and schema header presence.
Live output & files: Calculation ran via
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8s5f_z4j/live.json
The detailed JSON result is at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8s5f_z4j/live.json. The engine’s stdout/stderr was streamed live to a timestamped fukui_*.out log in the working directory (path provided at run launch).

Selected results (Mulliken-based indices, atom numbering as in supplied .xyz):
• Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (C), f⁺ = 0.39938962
• Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f⁻ = 0.23839906

Headline numeric result (reported per instructions):
0.39938962 (Fukui f⁺ value on the most electrophilic atom, C3)

No engine warnings were reported.
